raw_action_dict.reasoning: Delta of -15.4° to WP85 means the waypoint is to the right as the track curves right, so I apply -15° steering at 1.5 speed to follow the curve.
knowledge: Positive steering = left turn, negative = right turn
Delta under 5° means steer 0 to avoid oscillation
Near WP79-85, track curves right — expect negative delta values requiring right steering
Car is slightly left of center (0.053m) — consistent with right curve approach
Heading near -153° to -165° corresponds to westward/southwest travel on this section
Track curves right after WP80 toward WP85-90 — negative delta values expected
Zero steering when delta < 5° prevents oscillation and maintains speed
Track width ~0.76m — small corrections are sufficient, avoid overcorrecting
raw_action_dict.waypoint_analysis: Target WP85 at (1.114, 4.346): dy=-0.061, dx=-0.309, bearing=-168.84°, delta=-15.4° → waypoint to the RIGHT, steer -15°
